'''âz-r-y''' ('''kazaray''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lustre|lustre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lustre|lustre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-r-y
|-
! Lemma
| kazaray
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizaray|thizaray]] || [[word:jizaray|jizaray]] || [[word:shizaray|shizaray]] || [[word:kizaray|kizaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzaray|thuthuzaray]] || [[word:jujuzaray|jujuzaray]] || [[word:shushuzaray|shushuzaray]] || [[word:kukuzaray|kukuzaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzaray|thuzaray]] || [[word:juzaray|juzaray]] || [[word:shuzaray|shuzaray]] || [[word:kuzaray|kuzaray]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzaray|thuzaray]] || [[word:juzaray|juzaray]] || [[word:shuzaray|shuzaray]] || [[word:kuzaray|kuzaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezaray|thezaray]] || [[word:jezaray|jezaray]] || [[word:shezaray|shezaray]] || [[word:kezaray|kezaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozaray|thothozaray]] || [[word:jojozaray|jojozaray]] || [[word:shoshozaray|shoshozaray]] || [[word:kokozaray|kokozaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozaray|thozaray]] || [[word:jozaray|jozaray]] || [[word:shozaray|shozaray]] || [[word:kozaray|kozaray]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozaray|thozaray]] || [[word:jozaray|jozaray]] || [[word:shozaray|shozaray]] || [[word:kozaray|kozaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzaray|thĂŠzaray]] || [[word:jĂŠzaray|jĂŠzaray]] || [[word:shĂŠzaray|shĂŠzaray]] || [[word:kĂŠzaray|kĂŠzaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazaray|thathazaray]] || [[word:jajazaray|jajazaray]] || [[word:shashazaray|shashazaray]] || [[word:kakazaray|kakazaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazaray|thazaray]] || [[word:jazaray|jazaray]] || [[word:shazaray|shazaray]] || [[word:kazaray|kazaray]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazaray|thazaray]] || [[word:jazaray|jazaray]] || [[word:shazaray|shazaray]] || [[word:kazaray|kazaray]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazaray|shazaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazaray|goshazaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazaray|gokishazaray]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazaraynĂŒ|shazaraynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazaraynknĂŒ|goshazaraynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaraynĂŒ|gokishazaraynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazarayshĂ«|shazarayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazaraynkshĂ«|goshazaraynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazarayshĂ«|gokishazarayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarayro|shazarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaraynkro|goshazaraynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarayro|gokishazarayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaraymu|shazaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaraynkmu|goshazaraynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaraymu|gokishazaraymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazaraysher|shazaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazaraynksher|goshazaraynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazaraysher|gokishazaraysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazarayng|shazarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazaraynkng|goshazaraynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazarayng|gokishazarayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazaraya|shazaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazaraynkya|goshazaraynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazaraya|gokishazaraya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazarayam|shazarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazaraynkyam|goshazaraynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazarayam|gokishazarayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaraynĂŒshĂ«|shazaraynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaraynknĂŒshĂ«|goshazaraynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaraynĂŒshĂ«|gokishazaraynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaraynĂŒro|shazaraynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaraynknĂŒro|goshazaraynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaraynĂŒro|gokishazaraynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazaraynĂŒmu|shazaraynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaraynknĂŒmu|goshazaraynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazaraynĂŒmu|gokishazaraynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazarayshĂ«nĂŒ|shazarayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaraynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazaraynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazarayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazarayshĂ«ro|shazarayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaraynkshĂ«ro|goshazaraynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazarayshĂ«ro|gokishazarayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarayshĂ«mu|shazarayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaraynkshĂ«mu|goshazaraynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarayshĂ«mu|gokishazarayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazarayronĂŒ|shazarayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaraynkronĂŒ|goshazaraynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazarayronĂŒ|gokishazarayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazarayroshĂ«|shazarayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaraynkroshĂ«|goshazaraynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazarayroshĂ«|gokishazarayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazarayromu|shazarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazaraynkromu|goshazaraynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazarayromu|gokishazarayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazaraymunĂŒ|shazaraymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazaraynkmunĂŒ|goshazaraynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazaraymunĂŒ|gokishazaraymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazaraymushĂ«|shazaraymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazaraynkmushĂ«|goshazaraynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazaraymushĂ«|gokishazaraymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazaraymuro|shazaraymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazaraynkmuro|goshazaraynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazaraymuro|gokishazaraymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|718161e}}
